title: Oracle Cerner Technology to Manage Hospital Labs in 10 States
text: Cerner's lab information systems selected to help Labcorp streamline operations and enhance patient experiences for a leading health system  KANSAS CITY, Mo. , Nov. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Oracle Cerner and Labcorp, a leading global life sciences company, have formed a new relationship to streamline lab operations for one of the nation's leading nonprofit Catholic health systems.

title: Laboratory Corporation: Buy Rating Holds Following Solid Mid-Level Growth
text: LabCorp continues to rate as a buy following its Q3 numbers, despite a large pullback in Covid-19 revenue. Offsetting the distribution to its top-line, LH continues to compound capital and return on equity in the double digits, with debt flat YoY.
